title: artocarpus altilis
intro: Artocarpus altilis, also known as breadfruit, is a large, starchy fruit-bearing tree native to the Pacific Island region. The medicinal properties of Artocarpus altilis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation due to its high content of antioxidants and fiber. The health benefits of consuming Artocarpus altilis include improved digestion, reduced risk of heart disease, and potential anti-diabetic effects. In traditional medicine, Artocarpus altilis is often prepared as a tea or tincture to aid in digestion and as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
